# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

This source is a preprint with real empirical substance: it studies a collected dataset of 328 public configuration files, reports observed frequencies and patterns, and describes a concrete analysis method rather than offering opinion or generic commentary.

## Limits

Kept as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

This source is a preprint with real empirical substance: it studies a collected dataset of 328 public configuration files, reports observed frequencies and patterns, and describes a concrete analysis method rather than offering opinion or generic commentary.
